samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Data width conversion circuit that converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output. Generates valid_out and data_out signals based on the arrival of two data inputs. Resets on rst_n low signal.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating the validity of the input data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data to be converted.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating the validity of the output data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data resulting from the width conversion.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>When valid_in is high, if flag is high, concatenate data_lock and data_in to generate data_out. Otherwise, store data_in in data_lock. Reset data_out and data_lock on rst_n low signal. Generate valid_out and data_out signals in the next clock cycle after the two data inputs arrive.</implementation>
</module>
